title.en: Sterile hypodermic needles for single use - Requirements and test methods
title.zh: 灭菌的皮下注射用一次性使用针头 - 要求和试验方法

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for sterile, single-use hypodermic needles.
standards.scope: Sterile hypodermic needles for single use -- Requirements and test methods.

title.en: Sterile hypodermic syringes for single use - Part 1: Syringes for manual use
title.zh: 灭菌的一次性使用皮下注射注射器 - 第1部分：手动注射器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for sterile, single-use hypodermic syringes for manual use.
standards.scope: Sterile hypodermic syringes for single use -- Requirements and test methods.

title.en: Infusion equipment for medical use - Part 16: Infusion sets for single use with volumetric infusion controllers
title.zh: 医用输液设备 - 第16部分：与容积式输液控制器配合使用的一次性输液器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for sterilized, single-use, gravity feed infusion sets used together with volumetric infusion controllers of IEC 60601-2-24. Edition 1, published 2025-08.
standards.scope: Single-use infusion sets for volumetric controllers.

title.en: Transfusion equipment for medical use - Part 4: Transfusion sets for single use, gravity feed
title.zh: 医用输血设备 - 第4部分：一次性使用重力式输血器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for single use transfusion gravity sets for medical use, ensuring compatibility with blood and blood component containers. Edition 7, published 2025-05.

title.en: Transfusion equipment for medical use - Part 5: Transfusion sets for single use with pressure infusion apparatus
title.zh: 医用输血设备 - 第5部分：与加压输注装置配合使用的一次性输血器

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements for single use transfusion sets for use with pressure infusion equipment. Edition 2, published 2025-05.
standards.scope: Single-use transfusion sets for pressure infusion.

title.en: Small-bore connectors for liquids and gases in healthcare applications - Part 1: General requirements
title.zh: 医疗保健应用中液体和气体的小口径连接器 - 第1部分：通用要求

standards.abstract: Specifies general interface requirements for small-bore connectors conveying liquids or gases to patients. Provides methodology to assess non-interconnectable characteristics. Edition 3, published 2025-10.
standards.scope: Small-bore connectors for respiratory, enteral, intravascular, and neural applications.

title.en: Medical electrical equipment - Part 2-24: Particular requirements for the basic safety and essential performance of infusion pumps and controllers
title.zh: 医用电气设备 - 第2-24部分：输液泵和输液控制器的基本安全和基本性能的特殊要求

standards.abstract: Applies to the basic safety and essential performance of infusion pumps and volumetric infusion controllers. Edition 2, confirmed 2020.
standards.scope: Infusion pumps and volumetric infusion controllers (syringe pumps, peristaltic pumps, etc.).

title.en: Sharps injury protection - Sharps protection mechanisms for single-use needles, introducers for catheters and needles used for blood testing, monitoring, sampling and medical substance administration - Requirements and test methods (ISO 23908:2024)
title.zh: 利器伤害防护 - 一次性针头、导管引导器及用于血液检测、监测、采样和给药针头的利器防护机构 - 要求和试验方法

standards.note: International version of harmonised standard EN ISO 23908:2025
